title: Player Shells
description: Adds Shell Forges that allow players to create and transfer into new Shells - essentially new bodies with their own inventory, experience level, and even gamemode
body:
If you want to put this mod in your modpack, feel free to use it :)
This mod is inspired by [sync](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/sync) Adds Shell Forges that allow players to create and transfer into new Shells - essentially new bodies with their own inventory, experience level, and even gamemode. To create a Shell, you’ll first need to build a Shell Forge. Then, Shift + Right-click it to open it's creation GUI. Each Shell creation consumes 64 DNA, which you can obtain from the DNA Centrifuge and 1,000,000 FE (configurable) and takes about 10 minutes to complete (also configurable). The DNA Centrifuge processes a blood-filled syringe to produce 1-6 DNA samples. To fill a syringe with blood, right-click while holding an empty syringe (this inflicts 4 hearts of damage). Once you’ve built another Shell Forge, you can transfer your mind into any of your Shells. Simply right-click (without sneaking) a Shell Forge to go into it and open the radial menu, then select the desired Shell to transfer into. Mind transfers work across dimensions, too! Also when you die, your consciousness will automatically transfer to the nearest available Shell, granting you an extra life, even in Hardcore mode.
